statusLine.command: input=$(cat); current_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); project_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.project_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); style=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.output_style.name'); total_cost=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); git_branch=$(cd "$current_dir" 2>/dev/null && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo ''); printf "\033[38;2;48;52;70m\033[48;2;202;158;230m %s \033[0m\033[38;2;48;52;70m\033[48;2;140;170;238m %s \033[0m%s%s\033[38;2;165;173;206m \$%.2f\033[0m\033[38;2;165;173;206m at %s \033[0m" "$model" "$(basename "$current_dir")" "$([ -n "$git_branch" ] && printf "\033[38;2;48;52;70m\033[48;2;166;209;137m %s \033[0m" "$git_branch")" "$([ -n "$remaining" ] && printf "\033[38;2;165;173;206m ctx: %.0f%%\033[0m " "$remaining")" "$total_cost" "$(date '+%H:%M:%S')"
